publicationStmt.publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft

licence.p: This file is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0.

msItem.title: Maqdǝma wangel
msItem.incipit: በስመ፡ አብ፡ ወወልድ፡ ወመንፈስ፡ ቅዱስ፡ ወንሰብሖ፡ ስባሔ፡ ፍጹመ፡ በእንተ፡ ዘወሀበነ፡ ቦቱ፡ በእንተ፡ ዘአእተተ፡ እምኔነ፡ ኵሎ፡ ምግባረ፡ ዕልወታት፡ በዘአምጽአ፡ ቦቱ፡ ውስተ፡ ወንጌሉ፡ ቅዱስ፡ ዘቦቱ፡ አስተርአየት፡ ተአምራቲሁ፡ ወተከሥተት፡ መንከራቲሁ፡ ወዕበያቲሁ፡ ወስብሐት፡ ሎቱ። ወይክበር፡ ዕበዩ፡ ወይትለዓል፡ ዝክሩ፡ ወፍጽምናሁ፡ ምስለ፡ ዝንቱ፡ ከመ፡ እስትጉቡእ፡ ዘይትፈቀድ፡ ኀበ፡ ጥያቄሁ፡ ወመፍቅድ፡ ዘኀቤሃ፡ ውስተ፡ ኵሉ፡ መጽሕፍ፡ ፯፡ ወናሁ፡ ጸውዓተኒ፡ ፈቃዱ፡ ኀበ፡ ዘክሮታ፡ ወጽሕፈቱ፡ ውስተ፡ ዝንቱ፡ መጽሐፍ፡ ንጹሕ፡ ከመ፡ ይኩን፡ ብጽሐተ፡ ለረባሕ። ወመርሐ፡ ለዘየኃሥሥ፡ ዘይትፈቀድ። ወዛቲ፡ ይእቲ፡ መፍቅድ፡ ቀዳማዊ፡ ወካልኡ፡ በቍዔት፡ ወሣልሱ፡ ሥርዓት፡ ወራብዑ፡ ስም። ወኃምሱ፡ እምአይቴ፡ ወሳድሱ፡ ምስማክ፡ ወሳብዑ፡ አርእስተ፡ ነገር፡

msItem.title: Epistle of Eusebius to Carpianus (General record)
ግጻዌ፡ ሥርዓት፡ በእንተ፡ አኅብሮ፡ ቃላት፡ ዘአርባዕቱ፡ ወንጌላት።
Wangel za-Mātewos: Relialibity of the Gospel (same as LIT4875Reliability)
Wangel za-Mātewos: Tituli of the Gospel of Matthew
Wangel za-Luqās: Tituli of the Gospel of Luke
Gospel of John: Biography of John
Gospel of John: Tituli of the Gospel of John

supportDesc.foliation: Foliation by the library in the upper right corner.

layout.ab: Upper primary pricks are visible, lower primary pricks are mostly not visible, horizontal pricks are mostly not visible.
The upper line is written above the ruling, the lower line is written above the ruling.
Upper primary pricks are visible, lower primary pricks are mostly not visible, horizontal pricks are mostly not visible.
The upper line is written above the ruling, the lower line is written above the ruling.

handNote.seg: Written in a fine hand. and are written in the same hand.

decoDesc.summary: Prefixed to each Gospel is a portrait of the Evangelist, with his emblem; and there are many other pictures throughout the volume.

decoNote.desc: An Evangelist Portrait of Matthew and his emblem before .
An Evangelist Portrait of Mark and his emblem before .
An Evangelist Portrait of Luke and his emblem before .
An Evangelist Portrait of John and his emblem before .

additions.note: For all additions contained on , Gli archivi in AbissiniaAtti del Congresso internazionale di scienze storiche (Roma, 1–9 aprile 1903<hi rend="italics">), III: Atti della Sezione II: </hi>Storia medievale e moderna. Metodica – Scienze storiche ausiliarieIgnazioGuidiAccademia dei LinceiRomaTipografia della R. Accademia dei Lincei1906651-698http://archive.org/details/attidelcongress06romgoog is followed.

item.desc: The note records donations of ʾIyāsu II and Bǝrhān Mogasā to Dabra Ḍaḥay Qʷǝsqʷām.
item.q: ነዋ፡ ወሀብነ፡ ንሕነ፡ ንጉሠ፡ ነገሥት፡ ኢያሱ፡ ዘስመ፡ መንግሥትነ፡ ብርሃን፡ ሰገድ። ወእምነ፡ ንግሥት፡ ወለተ፡ ጊዮርጊስ። ብርሃን፡ ሞገሳ፡ ለቤተ፡ ክርስቲያነ፡ ቍስቋም። እንተ፡ ሕንጽት፡ በምድረ፡ ላይ፡ ጎንደር፡ ዘትሰመይ፡ ደብረ፡ ፀሓይ። አልባሳተ፡ ዘሐሪር፡ ወዘርቤታተ፡

item.desc: Vow of dedication by Tewoflos, perhaps in his own handwriting.
item.q: ሥሉስ፡ ቅዱስ፡ ኪዳነ፡ ምሕረት፡ መላእክት፡ አእላፋት፡ ነቢያት፡ ሐዋርያት፡ ፫፻፲ወ፷ርቱዐነ፡ ሃይማኖት፡ ሰማዕታት፡ ጻድቅ፡ ዮሐንስ፡ አእላፍ፡ ሰገድ፡ ለእሉ፡ ፷ከመ፡ እትክል፡ ታቦተ፡ በስሞሙ፡ ውስተ፡ አሐቲ፡ መካን፡ እንተ፡ ስማ፡ ኤዶም፡ ቀዳሚሃሰ፡ ነበረት፡ ትሰመይ፡ ደጎም፡ በጥቃሃ፡ ለደብረ፡ ምጽራሕ፡ ተመነይኩ፡ ወእመ፡ ሠምረ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ወሐየውኩ፡ እገብር፡ ዘንተ፡ ተምኔትየ፡ ዘውስተ፡ ልብየ፡ ባሕቱ፡ ጸልዩ፡ ሊተ፡ ኀበ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ዘኀቤሁ፡ ምብጻሐ፡ ኵሉ፡ ስዕለታት፡ ኵልክሙ፡ ካህናት፡ ምእመናን። ፯ወንጌል፡ ፭ሃይማኖተ፡ አበው፡ ፫ሐዲስ፡ ፩ግብረ፡ ሕማማት፡ ፩ቅዳሴ፡ ፩ሰንበት፡ አምኜ፡ እሉ፡ መጻሕፍት፡ ለእሉ፡ ታቦታት፡ ከመ፡ ይኩኑ፡ ወሀብነ፡ ንሕነ፡ ንጉሠ፡ ነገሥት፡ አጽራር፡ ሰገድ፡ ዘበጸጋ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ተሰመይነ፡ ቴዎፍሎስ።

item.desc: List of the names of the Nicene Fathers.
item.q: ወሶበ፡ ፈጸሙ፡ አበው፡ ኤጲስ፡ ቆጶሳት፡ ዘፈቀዱ፡ ባቲ፡ ኵሎ፡ ሥርዓተ፡ ጸሐፉ፡ ዓዲ፡ ሃይማኖተ፡ ርትዕተ፡ ወቅድስተ፡ ወጽድቅተ፡ ወኃብሩ፡ ባቲ፡ ወተሰነዓዉ፡ ላዕሌሁ፡ እሉ፡ እሙንቱ፡ አበው፡ ፫፻፲ወ፰ኤጲስ፡ ቆጶሳት፡ ወለኵሎሙ፡ አስማቲሆሙ፡ ዝውእቱ፡ ሶል፡ ጴጥሮስ፡ ሊቀ፡ ጳጳሳት፡ ዘሮሜ፡ እለ፡ እስክድሮስ፡ ዘግብጽ፡ ወእለ፡ እስክድርያ፡ ወለተባይስ፡

item.desc: Deed of the reign of ʾIyāsu, possibly ʾIyāsu III.
Deed of the reign of ʾIyāsu, possibly ʾIyāsu III.
Deed of the reign of ʾƎgʷāla Ṣǝyon.
List of clergy and others, who were to undertake certain duties in turn during the months of Maskaram, Ṭǝqǝmt, Ḫǝdār, Tāḫśāś and Ṭǝrr.
item.q: ዘመስከረም፡ መራህያን። ደንጎርሳ፡ ዘማርያም፡ ማንደርሶ፡ ዝክረ፡ ማርያም። ደባትር፡ ዳዊቄት፡ ርእቄሴ፡ ዘመርጡለ፡ ማርያም፡ መርቆሬዎቄስ፡ ዘጽላሎ፡ ፍሥሐ፡ ጽዮን፡ ባለፙል፡ ኤዎስጣቴዎስ። ቤተ፡ ጠባቂ፡ አዛዠ፡ ካሊድ፡ ገድለ ኤዎስጣቴዎስ። ዘግራ፡ መራህያን፡ መልአከ፡ ብርሃናት፡ ቀውስጦስ፡ ደብሳን፡ አግኔ፡ ይስሐቅ፡ መርቆሬዎስ፡ ዘቃኃ። ደባትር፡ አባ፡ እንጦንዮቄስ፡ መደባይ፡ መልክአ፡ ክርስቄቶስ፡ ንዋየ፡ ማርያም፡ ወይዘሮ፡ ወለተ፡ ጊዮርጊስ፡ ቃለ፡ ክርስቶስ። ቤተ፡ ጠባቂ፡ ባስልዮስ። ። መራህያን፡ ዘጥቅምት። ዘቀኝ፡ አባ፡ ሱራሄ፡ ኤዎስጣቴዎስ፡

item.desc: Deed of the reign of Takla Giyorgis I.
Deed of the reign of Takla Giyorgis I.
Deed of the reign of Takla Giyorgis I.
List of furniture and other items.
item.q: ኍልቈ፡ ንዋየ፡ ቅድሳት፡ ዘ፫፻፡ ከሳት፡ በኋላ፡

item.desc: Deed recording the building and endowment of Ḥamara Noḫ, which Tewoflos founded by the act .

bibl.title: Gli archivi in Abissinia
Atti del Congresso internazionale di scienze storiche (Roma, 1–9 aprile 1903<hi rend="italics">), III: Atti della Sezione II: </hi>Storia medievale e moderna. Metodica – Scienze storiche ausiliarie
bibl.publisher: Tipografia della R. Accademia dei Lincei

item.desc: List of the furniture of Ḥamara Noḫ, possible the end of the list of donations to the church by Tewoflos, .

binding.decoNote: In the original boards, lined with flowered silk and covered with blind-tooled leather.

history.provenance: The manuscript had very probably belonged to a church in the Gondar area, from where it was taken by Tewodros and brought to Madḫāne ʿĀlam. It was then looted by the British Napier expedition in 1868.

bibl.title: Catalogue of the Ethiopic Manuscripts in the British Museum Acquired since the Year 1847
bibl.publisher: Gilbert and Rivington

projectDesc.p: Encoded according to TEI P5 Guidelines.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded according to the Beta maṣāḥǝft Guidelines. These Guidelines detail the TEI format ruled by the Beta maṣāḥǝft Schema. The present TEI file is enriched with an Xquery transformation taking advantage of the exist-db database instance where the data is stored and of the many external resources to which this data points to.

calendar.p: ʿĀmata ʿālam/ʿĀmata ʾəm-fəṭrat (Era of the World)
ʿĀmata śəggāwe (Era of the Incarnation – Ethiopian)
